emails.subject: Re: Visit to Enron
emails.body: Elizabeth, We want to bring this guy for a formal interview on Jan 24. Did I send you his resume? Vince Forwarded by Vince J Kaminski/HOU/ECT on 01/17/2000 12:47 PM Robert Lee <rrlee@bizserve.com> on 01/17/2000 09:36:01 AM

emails.subject: Re: Visit to Enron
emails.body: Yes you did and my assistant Felicia Solis is working on the schedule. She will be contacting Bob today to introduce herself and to let him know the arrangements she is making. Elizabeth Vince J Kaminski 01/17/2000 12:48 PM
